RESOLUTION.DESC:
The Security Council,
Understanding the resolutions ratified by this chamber are the collective expression of the world’s developed regions with a foremost interest in upholding international peace, goodwill, and sovereignty of its members,
Reiterating that this chamber strives to maintain a high standard for recognizing the most accomplished nations and regions in their respective fields,
Avowing the status of Security Council condemnations as highly sought after in the manner commendations are, as rewards for extensive contributions to global events. This chamber notes the desirability of condemnations by nations and regions deemed to have nefarious traits and repute on the global stage, awarding several with the distinction of “condemned,” and offers the following examples to support this acknowledgement:
[list][*]Dalimbar, Wickedly Evil People, and Bhang Bhang Duc: all prominent figures historic to The West Pacific, whose condemnations were welcomed, authored, and passed in part by West Pacificans or through the channels of government in the West, [*]Creeperopolis: condemned for their national lore, despite their leadership of a major Defender region, and condemned with the excitement of their community as its first member to be recognized by a Security Council resolution, [*]Dream Killers, Elysium Station II, and A Bloodred Moon: all members of Lone Wolves United, the former two’s condemnations sponsored by the leading officers of Lone Wolves United at the time,[/list]
Opining with confidence that Lone Wolves United views their condemnation as a positive, honorific conferment by the global community. In support of this claim, it is noted that Lone Wolves United utilizes the condemnation as an immensely useful tool to recruit additional nations to their cause, a sign of global significance, and proof of their pretensions that they are a significant threat to the civilized world,
Returning to the premise that the Security Council is the collective will of the nations and regions that engage with it, and noting that Lone Wolves United has aggrieved many of the members that this principle applies to. While many of these transgressions were not ultimately successful (an important clarification as to dispel an argument of condemnability), they represent an indignance to the very regions that have allowed them this condemnation, demonstrated via the following:
[list][*]Careless disregard for The North Pacific, a region with which they supposedly wished to form a stronger partnership, as demonstrated by the use of one of the North’s allies as a military diversion, which led to that ally being a target of invaders in subsequent years, and their continued collaboration with Raider Unity forces after they displaced the North’s WA Delegate, [*]Inept entryism into The East Pacific in recent years, culminating in the exposure of the subversive intent by intelligence assets and political collapse of their ambitions in the region in 2025, resulting in their proscription, [*]Futile antagonism of Lazarus, despite the region allowing figures from Lone Wolves United to operate in the region for years in an ill-fated attempt at amnesty following the Wolves’ attempt to colonize the Restorer in 2018, [*]Gratuitous betrayal of its allies in The West Pacific by attempts to divide the region’s leadership and weaken its foreign affairs apparatus for their own benefit despite years of prior collaboration, [*]A sickening attempt to depose the WA Delegate of the Outback by ceasing their alliance as a pretext to libelling the nation in question, with the aim of installing one of their own officers as WA Delegate, [*]Hijacking the early ideological development of the Frontier world, only for their dishonesty and subterfuge to become increasingly noticed, culminating in the collapse of this façade with the liberation of Lonia Kreptia Llor and its fallout,[/list]
Observing the irony that without its outsized reliance on support from benefactors it would later betray or allies that would become isolated themselves, Lone Wolves United could not have continued the aforementioned mischief as long as they did,
Supplementing the above argument with the acknowledgement that the target resolution’s writing is of dim quality, it cites various unimportant “accomplishments” such as periodic and temporary invasions of The Cuckoos Egg, or raids overcome by native communities such as Anarchy, and that the existing authors of the target resolution have consented to this repeal and expressed support for the condemnation’s nullification,
Reaffirming the Security Council’s mission of spreading peace and goodwill, which is fulfilled by denying praise, awards, and political prize to an unworthy paramilitary, therefore earning neither infamy nor permanent reward of any kind,
Hereby repeals Security Council Resolution 74, “Condemn Lone Wolves United.”
RESOLUTION.NAME: Repeal "Condemn Lone Wolves United"
